description.value:
Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points while Communion lasts.

The Ansu does not permit the vessel to break, and it answers. You remain at 1 Hit Point, you immediately make one melee Strike against the creature that reduced you to 0 Hit Points (if it is within your melee reach), and you increase your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} condition by 1: the body keeps the bill.

You can't use this reaction again for 10 minutes.
